query: SELECT id, status, scoreA, scoreB, aiSummary IS NOT NULL as hasAiSummary, matchStatistics IS NOT NULL as hasStats, goalsTimeline IS NOT NULL as hasGoals FROM games WHERE status = 'FT' LIMIT 10;
